Problem

->  Barrier to enter research is too high
-> Students have difficulty reading research papers
-> People do not understand the papers
-> It takes researchers within the field a long time to understand a paper

children.name: Persona: who is this character? Students doing research, undergrad and grad, Researchers Problem: what is the problem/pain? Too hard to read these papers Market: how many of such personas exist? Competition: what can this persona do to solve the problem today? Why is that not good enough? Products like paperdigest or academic newsletters but these summarize the articles and dilute the information To do research, researchers need to understand every part of the paper, not just wha the paper is about Purpose: you are about to create a whole new world We want to decrease the barrier to entry to the research field Solution: so how will you solve the problem? We want to build an app that reorganizes the paper, gives supplemental aid with definitions and explanations of difficult topics, and does some basic analysis. Product: how will your persona use your solution? What is the product? they can upload a pdf and get a basic analysis, and upgrade for stronger tools Why now? Need more apps in the academic field to boost innovation Business model: how do you make money? upgraded version subscription Team: why are you the right set of people? I am Math and Physicsw, do research, currently looking for a partner more technical than myself 1-year plan.. a small roadmap on your way to world domination. Integrate into stevens research
children.characters:
Persona: who is this character?
         Students doing research, undergrad and grad, Researchers
    Problem: what is the problem/pain?
          Too hard to read these papers
    Market: how many of such personas exist?
    Competition: what can this persona do to solve the problem today? Why is that not good enough?
          Products like paperdigest or academic newsletters but these      summarize the articles and dilute the information
          To do research, researchers need to understand every part of the paper, not just wha the paper is about
    Purpose: you are about to create a whole new world
          We want to decrease the barrier to entry to the research field
    Solution: so how will you solve the problem?
          We want to build an app that reorganizes the paper, gives supplemental aid with definitions and explanations of difficult topics, and does some basic analysis.
    Product: how will your persona use your solution? What is the product?
          they can upload a pdf and get a basic analysis, and upgrade for stronger tools
    Why now?
          Need more apps in the academic field to boost innovation
    Business model: how do you make money?
           upgraded version subscription
    Team: why are you the right set of people?
          I am Math and Physicsw, do research, currently looking for a partner more technical than myself
    1-year plan.. a small roadmap on your way to world domination. 
          Integrate into stevens research

children.name: Founder Requirements Dedication -> Must work as hard as equity ownership -> Must be passionate about tasks ->Communication between founders ->gets work done promptly and if not, communicates it -> willing to devote next 5-10 years to building a legendary company Personality -> Willing to disagree -> Takes breaks when needed -> Friends when not working -> wants to build a legendary company that helps people and treats them as citizens Skills -> Skilled in programming -js -react -? -> Reasoning and feeling -Can use logic to make quality decisions -Can feel whether something may be good or bad
